title: Auto
description: The ultimate automation mod (The mod is in French)
body: You can cook the stone in a vania blast furnace to obtain pieces of ore to put in the cobble breaker powered by redstone to obtain nuggets of ore like iron, diamond... Or even seeds in a vania furnace which will be transformed into wheat then into bread or beet seeds into beet or poisoned potatoes into potatoes. You can ask me on Discord ((maximusuperplus) in French preferably) to add something else that the mod can do. (The mod is in French)
